scripts.build:github: tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode github-pages && node scripts/generate-service-worker.mjs /solar-system-sim-design/
scripts.verify:math: python3 scripts/verify_orbit_math.py && python3 scripts/verify_camera_framing.py && python3 scripts/verify_planet_orbits_against_jpl.py && python3 scripts/verify_label_scaling.py && python3 scripts/verify_moon_scaling.py && python3 scripts/verify_rocket_transfer_math.py
